messages.content: write a cover letter for a staff software engineer applicant to onboardbase
messages.assistant_reply:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Staff Software Engineer position at Onboardbase. I am excited about the opportunity to join your team and contribute my skills and experience to help drive the success of your organization.

I have a strong background in software engineering and have worked on a variety of projects over the course of my career. I have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and have been working in the field for over 10 years.

I am skilled in a range of programming languages, including Java, C++, and Python, and have experience working with both front-end and back-end technologies. In my most recent position, I worked as a Senior Software Engineer for a large tech company, where I was responsible for designing and implementing highly scalable and reliable software systems.

I am confident in my ability to hit the ground running and make meaningful contributions to your team from day one. In addition to my technical skills, I am a team player and enjoy collaborating with others to solve complex problems.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to discussing the opportunity further and to learn more about the challenges and opportunities at Onboardbase.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]

messages.content: The first part of the plot for the first chapter involved the amnesiacs waking up in separate locations. Yukiko wakes up first in an abandoned part of the tower basement, and causes takeshi's room to drop from the top of the tower, which wakes him up. They don't remember anything, and they don't know their names. They are instructed to climb a tower where the Gladiators are at by their inner demons. These inner demons also prompt the amnesiacs to technically demolish a slave encampment on the way to the tower by eliminating the encampment staff who were abusing the slaves (this introduces the player to the secret protagonists' feral state) once they finally make it too the top of the tower, they meet each other face to face for the first time and suddenly have a flashback of them fighting each other. They don't completely understand the flashback, but they are in a lot of pain and assume the other is the cause of their mental anguish. Yukiko wants to avoid Takeshi, however Takeshi attacks yukiko and wants answers. They cause an explosion and slowly fight their way down the tower, with yukiko making evasive maneuvers, and takeshi being a brute. Once they make it to the bottom, yukiko manages to trick Takeshi and trip him over the edge of a nearby cliff. However, because yukiko is not that strong, she falls in as well. Yukiko doesn't fall very far because she is able to catch herself, however Takeshi falls to the deepest part of the Ravine. This wasn't yukiko's intention, so she tried to go after Takeshi, but is too exhausted, and falls into the nearby river instead. This sets up Takeshi to be found by the Renegades and Yukiko to be found by the Gladiators. The first part ends as they fall unconscious in separate locations again. Would this be a good introduction for the amnesiacs? What are some ways to refine this first part of the plot?
messages.assistant_reply: This first part of the plot is a good introduction for the amnesiacs and sets up the premise of their amnesia and the conflict between them. It also establishes their inner demons and feral state, which adds to their character development. To refine this first part, you could consider adding more detail to the environment and setting to help the reader better visualize the world. Additionally, you could provide more context and hints about their past and the source of their amnesia, to build intrigue and keep the reader engaged. It could also be useful to develop the characters' motivations and personalities further, so that their actions and reactions are more relatable and understandable. Finally, consider adding more tension and suspense to the scene where Yukiko and Takeshi first meet, as this is a critical moment in the plot and can be used to further set the stage for the rest of the story.

messages.content: Alright, I think I have some ideas. The next part of the plot is shortly after the amnesiacs fall unconscious. There was obviously a lot of commotion with the amnesiacs making a mess of the area. However, the organization can't investigate it themselves because they don't want to expose themselves. So they wake up the Gladiators and the Renegades to have them investigate the situation in their place. Each perspective starts with a cut scene explaining the character's experience in the Gladiator Trials, as well as their connection with the amnesiacs. Since the amnesiacs are unplayable at this moment, players playing the secret perspectives will switch to either Adelaide and Rhydderch depending on which amnesiac they chose to play as. This is also where a cutscene will play explaining Adelaide's and Rhydderch's experience in the trials as well as their childhood memory of their timetraveling hero. Once the cut scene finishes and each character is ready, they leave individual confinement and are introduced to the other characters on their respective teams. It's important to note that Damjan and Damia are not present in this section. The two are made to tame the amnesiacs mental instabilities, and sense the amnesiacs have technically switched places, the organization is waiting for when the amnesiacs are found before waking up the tamer twins and deploying them into their respective teams. After introductions, normally they would let the survivors chose which Platoon they want to be in and which people they want to work with. However because they are missing some people, they decide to postpone this and deploys everyone onto the field to find their missing members. This becomes the tutorial to the six main characters. What are some ways to refine this section?
messages.assistant_reply:
Here are some suggestions for refining this section:

1. Develop the characters: Make sure to provide enough background information and context for the characters in the cutscenes, so that the players can understand who they are and what motivates them. This will help the players become invested in the characters and feel connected to them.
2. Provide more context: Provide more context on the situation with the amnesiacs and the reason for their investigation. This can include the impact of their actions and the consequences for both the organization and the survivors.
3. Add tension: Create a sense of urgency and tension around the investigation. This could be achieved through the use of music, sound effects, and visuals that emphasize the danger and uncertainty of the situation.
4. Make the tutorials interesting: Use the tutorials to introduce the gameplay mechanics in an engaging and entertaining way. This can be achieved by incorporating the mechanics into the storyline and making them an integral part of the investigation.
5. Introduce Damjan and Damia: Provide a brief introduction to Damjan and Damia and their role in the trials. This can help set the stage for their later appearance and give the players a sense of what is to come.
6. Add choice: Offer the players choices that affect the outcome of the investigation, such as which team they join and which characters they work with. This can increase player engagement and provide a sense of agency.

messages.content: I can work with that. It's probably important to note that Yukiko was intended to join the Renegades and for Takeshi to join the Gladiators, as this would separate yukiko from Adelaide and takeshi from rhydderch, since the two pairs were very close. As such, Tamma is hoping they find Takeshi and yuudai is hoping to find yukiko. However, after some fighitng and searching, the Gladiators find yukiko and the Renegades find Takeshi. Tamma and Yuudai say they found the wrong person, and insist they keep searching, because it was stated the person they are looking for is the opposite gender. The team acknowledges this, however Adelaide and Rhydderch are adamant that they found the right person, and should be give medical assistance, as the amnesiac they found is unconscious with possible brain damage. The teams decide to keep searching at the insistence of Tamma and Yuudai, leaving Adelaide and Rhydderch behind with their respective amnesiac. Would it also make sense for Francessca and Eugene to stay behind with their respecitve amnesiac as well, since they were also close with them before their amnesia, and do not mistake Tamma/Yuudai for their mysterious friend back in the gladiator trials?
messages.assistant_reply: Yes, it makes sense for Francessca and Eugene to stay behind with their respective amnesiac, as they too were close with them prior to their amnesia. This would add an extra layer of tension to the situation, as Francessca and Eugene would be at odds with Tamma and Yuudai, who are still searching for the person they believe to be their true companion. Additionally, it would also reinforce the idea that the amnesiacs have switched places, and the true identity of each person is not yet clear. This could also create a parallel situation where Adelaide and Rhydderch are in a similar situation as Francessca and Eugene, as they both believe they have found the right person, but are at odds with the other members of their team.

messages.content: Francessca, Adelaide, Eugene, and Rhydderch are still separated from their respective groups, and are not present when Damjan and Damia are introduced. Instead, the two parties take the time to fully tend to their respective unconscious amnesiacs, and find enough evidence to prove that their amnesiac is the same person as their mysterious friend from the gladiator trials (not only are the tools they have and use are similar, yukiko has the bracelet Adelaide made for her before the end of the trials, and Takeshi has the same scarf cloak Rhydderch gave him.) They also analyze that their friend has sustained some form of brain trauma, and may not remember things. Does it make sense for the two parties to Platoon up with their respective amnesiac without the agreement with the rest of the team? Would it make sense for them to suspect Tamma and Yuudai to be working against the amnesiacs? It is important to note that Platoon assignments are permanent, which is why everyone needs to be in agreement in which Platoon they want to be in.
messages.assistant_reply:
Yes, it would make sense for Francessca, Adelaide, Eugene, and Rhydderch to Platoon up with their respective amnesiac based on the evidence they've gathered and their belief that their amnesiac is their mysterious friend from the Gladiator Trials. Their urgency to protect their friend and ensure their safety is likely a strong motivator for them to make this decision without the agreement of the rest of the team.

As for their suspicion towards Tamma and Yuudai, it would be understandable for Francessca, Adelaide, Eugene, and Rhydderch to have concerns given the conflicting information about the amnesiacs. Tamma and Yuudai's insistence on keeping the search going and their refusal to acknowledge the amnesiacs as their missing friends could be seen as suspicious behavior. However, it's also possible that Tamma and Yuudai have their own motivations and reasons for not accepting the amnesiacs right away, and it could be a point of tension and conflict within the game.

messages.content: I'm thinking of getting a screen protector for my new Samsung Galaxy S22. Do you have any recommendations? By the way, I'm a bit paranoid about screen protection since I cracked my old phone's screen back in January when I dropped it on the bathroom floor while getting ready for a job interview.
messages.assistant_reply:
I totally understand your concern! Dropping your phone on the bathroom floor can be a nightmare, especially when it happens at the worst possible time.

Don't worry, I'm here to help you find a great screen protector for your new Samsung Galaxy S22. Here are some recommendations based on popular brands, features, and customer reviews:

**Top Picks:**

1. **Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+**: A popular choice among Samsung users, this screen protector offers advanced clarity, durability, and protection. It's made with tempered glass, has a sleek design, and is easy to install.
2. **Samsung Official Screen Protector**: If you want a protector that's specifically designed for your Galaxy S22, Samsung's official screen protector is a great option. It's designed to provide optimal clarity, durability, and protection.
3. **TechArmor High Definition Screen Protector**: This protector offers excellent clarity, scratch resistance, and protection against drops and bumps. It's also easy to install and has a lifetime warranty.

**Other Great Options:**

1. **OtterBox Amplify Glass Screen Protector**: Known for their rugged cases, OtterBox also offers a great screen protector that provides excellent protection and clarity.
2. **BodyGuardz Ace Pro Screen Protector**: This protector offers advanced protection, a sleek design, and a lifetime warranty.
3. **Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector**: This protector provides a unique, flexible design that's easy to install and offers great protection against scratches and drops.

**Features to Consider:**

1. **Tempered glass**: Provides extra protection against drops and scratches.
2. **Oleophobic coating**: Reduces fingerprints and smudges.
3. **Case-friendly design**: Ensures compatibility with your phone case.
4. **Easy installation**: Look for protectors with easy installation processes to avoid bubbles and air pockets.
5. **Warranty**: Consider protectors with a lifetime warranty or a good return policy.

**Tips for Installation:**

1. Clean your screen thoroughly before applying the protector.
2. Use a credit card or similar tool to remove air bubbles.
3. Apply the protector in a dust-free environment.
4. Take your time and align the protector carefully.

I hope this helps you find the perfect screen protector for your Samsung Galaxy S22!

messages.content: I'm interested in the Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+ and the Samsung Official Screen Protector. Can you compare their prices and availability? Also, do you think I should get a screen protector with a matte finish or a glossy one?
messages.assistant_reply:
Great choices! Both the Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+ and the Samsung Official Screen Protector are high-quality options. Here's a comparison of their prices and availability:

**Prices:**

1. **Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+**:
	* Amazon: $29.99 - $39.99 (depending on the model and bundle)
	* Zagg's Official Website: $39.99
	* Best Buy: $39.99
2. **Samsung Official Screen Protector**:
	* Samsung's Official Website: $29.99
	* Amazon: $24.99 - $34.99 (depending on the seller and bundle)
	* Best Buy: $29.99

**Availability:**

Both screen protectors are widely available online and in-store at major retailers like Amazon, Best Buy, and the manufacturers' official websites.

Now, about the finish:

**Matte vs. Glossy:**

The choice between a matte and glossy finish ultimately comes down to personal preference. Here are some points to consider:

**Matte Finish:**

1. **Reduces fingerprints**: Matte finishes tend to hide fingerprints and smudges better than glossy finishes.
2. **Less glare**: Matte finishes can reduce glare from surrounding lights, making it easier to read your screen in bright environments.
3. **More subtle look**: Matte finishes can give your phone a more understated, subtle look.

**Glossy Finish:**

1. **More vibrant colors**: Glossy finishes can make your screen's colors appear more vibrant and saturated.
2. **Easier to clean**: Glossy finishes can be easier to clean, as they tend to repel fingerprints and smudges.
3. **More premium feel**: Glossy finishes can give your phone a more premium, high-end look and feel.

Both the Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+ and the Samsung Official Screen Protector come in glossy finishes. However, Zagg also offers a matte finish option for their Glass+ protector.

If you're concerned about fingerprints and glare, a matte finish might be the better choice. If you prefer a more vibrant, premium look, a glossy finish might be the way to go.

I hope this helps you make a more informed decision!

messages.content: I think I'll go with the glossy finish. I'm not too concerned about fingerprints, and I like the way it looks. For the Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+, do you think I should get the regular version or the one with the " Anti-Glare" feature?
messages.assistant_reply:
The glossy finish will definitely showcase your Galaxy S22's vibrant screen.

Now, about the Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+ options:

**Regular vs. Anti-Glare:**

The main difference between the regular Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+ and the Anti-Glare version is the way they handle screen glare.

**Regular Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+:**

1. **Standard glare reduction**: The regular version still provides some glare reduction, but it's not as pronounced as the Anti-Glare version.
2. **More vibrant colors**: The regular version might preserve the screen's natural color vibrancy and saturation slightly better.

**Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+ with Anti-Glare:**

1. **Enhanced glare reduction**: The Anti-Glare version is specifically designed to reduce glare from surrounding lights, making it ideal for outdoor use or in bright environments.
2. **Slightly muted colors**: The Anti-Glare coating might slightly mute the screen's colors, but this is a trade-off for improved glare reduction.

Consider the following questions to help you decide:

1. Do you often use your phone outdoors or in very bright environments?
2. Are you sensitive to screen glare?
3. Do you prioritize color vibrancy or glare reduction?

If you answered "yes" to the first two questions, the Anti-Glare version might be the better choice. However, if you're not too concerned about glare and want to preserve the screen's natural color vibrancy, the regular version could be the way to go.

Keep in mind that the Anti-Glare feature is not a night-and-day difference, and both versions will still provide excellent protection and clarity.

I hope this helps you make a decision that fits your needs!

messages.content: I think I'll go with the regular Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+. I don't use my phone outdoors that much, and I prefer the more vibrant colors. Also, I'm getting a new phone mount for my car, so I'll be using my phone in a more controlled environment anyway.
messages.assistant_reply:
The regular Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+ will provide excellent protection and clarity for your Galaxy S22. You'll enjoy the vibrant colors and crisp display, and the tempered glass will give you peace of mind against scratches and drops.

It's great that you're getting a new phone mount for your car, too! Using your phone in a controlled environment will definitely reduce the risk of damage. With the Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+ and a sturdy phone mount, you'll be all set for safe and convenient phone use on the go!

Before you make your final purchase, I just want to remind you to check for any promotions, discounts, or bundles that might be available. You can check the Zagg website, Amazon, or other retailers for any deals that might sweeten the deal.

If you have any more questions or concerns, feel free to ask. Otherwise, I hope you enjoy your new phone and accessories!

messages.content: I'm good to go with the purchase. Thanks for the advice!
messages.assistant_reply:
You're welcome! It was my pleasure to help. I hope you'll enjoy your new Galaxy S22 with the Zagg InvisibleShield Glass+ protector. If you have any more questions or need further assistance in the future, don't hesitate to reach out.

Remember to handle your new phone with care, and the screen protector will do its job to keep your screen safe from scratches and cracks.

Have a great day, and happy shopping!

messages.content: I'd like to ask about other accessories for my new phone. Do you have any recommendations for a good wireless charging pad? I've heard that some of them can charge my phone faster than others.
messages.assistant_reply:
Wireless charging is a fantastic convenience, and there are many great options out there. Yes, some wireless charging pads can charge your phone faster than others, depending on the technology and power output.

Here are some recommendations for fast and reliable wireless charging pads:

**Top Picks:**

1. **Samsung Wireless Charger Duo**: A great option from Samsung, which supports fast charging up to 15W. It's a dual-pad charger, so you can charge two devices at once.
2. **Anker Wireless Charger PowerWave 7.5 Pad**: Anker is a well-known brand for charging accessories, and this pad supports fast charging up to 10W. It's also affordable and compact.
3. **Belkin Boost Up Wireless Charging Pad**: Belkin's pad supports fast charging up to 10W and has a sleek, modern design. It's also Qi-certified, ensuring compatibility with your Galaxy S22.

**Fast Charging Standards:**

When shopping for a wireless charging pad, look for these fast charging standards:

1. **Qi (Wireless Power Consortium)**: The most common wireless charging standard, supported by most devices.
2. **Fast Wireless Charging 2.0**: Supports up to 15W fast charging, available on some Samsung devices, including the Galaxy S22.
3. **Quick Wireless Charging**: Supports up to 10W fast charging, available on some devices.

**Things to Consider:**

1. **Power output**: Look for pads with higher power output (e.g., 10W or 15W) for faster charging.
2. **Qi certification**: Ensure the pad is Qi-certified to guarantee compatibility with your device.
3. **Design and size**: Consider the pad's design, size, and material, as well as any additional features like a built-in stand or cooling fan.

When choosing a wireless charging pad, make sure to check the product description or manufacturer's website for compatibility with your Galaxy S22. Some pads might require a specific adapter or have specific requirements for fast charging.

I hope this helps you find the perfect wireless charging pad for your new phone!

messages.content: I am going to build a full stack web site with front end using React.js and backend using express.js ... I want to add a functionality to send a file on multiple social media platforms like linkedin, whatsapp and email etc.. how can I do that?
messages.assistant_reply:
To add the functionality of sending a file on multiple social media platforms like LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and email, you can use their respective APIs to implement the feature in your application. Here are some general steps you can follow:

1. Obtain the API keys for the social media platforms you want to use. For example, LinkedIn has the LinkedIn Marketing Developer Platform, WhatsApp has the WhatsApp Business API, and email services have various APIs such as the Gmail API.
2. Set up the API clients in your backend using Express.js. You can use libraries like `node-linkedin` for LinkedIn, `whatsapp-web.js` for WhatsApp, and `nodemailer` for email services.
3. Create a route in your backend to handle the file upload and sending it to the social media platforms. You can use `multer` middleware to handle file uploads.
4. In the frontend using React.js, create a form for the user to upload the file and select the social media platforms to send it to.
5. When the user submits the form, send a request to the backend route created in step 3, which will handle sending the file to the selected social media platforms using their respective APIs.
6. Handle any errors or exceptions that may occur during the file upload or sending process.

It's worth noting that each social media platform may have different requirements and limitations for sending files through their APIs, so be sure to check their documentation for specific details.

messages.content: How did Marianne symbolize the idea of the French Republic in the 19th century?
messages.assistant_reply: Marianne was a symbol of the French Republic in the 19th century because she personified the values of liberty, equality, and fraternity that were central to the ideals of the Republic. Marianne was often depicted as a beautiful, strong-willed woman who represented the revolutionary spirit of France. Her image could be seen on everything from coins and stamps to public buildings and monuments. Marianne became a symbol of national unity and an embodiment of the French people's aspirations for social justice and political reform. She represented the ideal of a democratic, progressive, and forward-thinking society that valued individual rights and collective responsibility. In short, Marianne was the face of the French Republic, and her image served as a powerful reminder of the nation's goals and aspirations.

messages.content: Hmm, I don't really get why they chose a woman to represent the ideals of the Republic. Isn't that kind of sexist?
messages.assistant_reply: It is true that the choice to represent the French Republic through a female figure may seem sexist by today's standards. However, during the 19th century, using a feminine figure as a national symbol was not unusual. Other countries, such as the United States, have also used feminine figures like Columbia to represent their ideals of liberty and freedom. The choice of a woman to represent the Republic may have had several reasons - She symbolically represented the French Republic as a nurturing mother, in addition to her beauty and strength. Additionally, the French Revolution and the subsequent establishment of the Republic were seen as a break from the monarchical tradition of male rulers, so a female figure came to symbolize this new era of equality and democracy. Overall, the choice of Marianne as a symbol for the French Republic was a reflection of the values of the time and may not necessarily be sexist in intent.

messages.content: I still think it's kind of misogynistic to use a woman as a mere symbol. Did they actually give women more rights during that time or was it just empty symbolism?
messages.assistant_reply: The use of Marianne as a symbol of the French Republic does not necessarily indicate that women were truly given equal rights during the 19th century. However, it is worth noting that in some cases, the use of symbols like Marianne did contribute to the progress of women's rights. For example, during the early years of the Third Republic (1870-1940), the image of Marianne was often used in political propaganda, and many intellectuals and feminists argued that the values she embodied, such as liberty, equality, and fraternity, should be extended to women as well. In 1944, after the end of World War II, women in France were granted the right to vote for the first time, and this was partly due to the efforts of feminist activists who had relied on symbols like Marianne to make their case. So while the use of Marianne as a symbol was not sufficient to achieve gender equality, it was an important part of a larger movement toward greater gender equity and representation.

**Fast Charging Standards:**

When shopping for a wireless charging pad, look for these fast charging standards:

1. **Qi (Wireless Power Consortium)**: The most common wireless charging standard, supported by most devices.
2. **Fast Wireless Charging 2.0**: Supports up to 15W fast charging, available on some Samsung devices, including the Galaxy S22.
3. **Quick Wireless Charging**: Supports up to 10W fast charging, available on some devices.

**Things to Consider:**

1. **Power output**: Look for pads with higher power output (e.g., 10W or 15W) for faster charging.
2. **Qi certification**: Ensure the pad is Qi-certified to guarantee compatibility with your device.
3. **Design and size**: Consider the pad's design, size, and material, as well as any additional features like a built-in stand or cooling fan.

When choosing a wireless charging pad, make sure to check the product description or manufacturer's website for compatibility with your Galaxy S22. Some pads might require a specific adapter or have specific requirements for fast charging.

To add the functionality of sending a file on multiple social media platforms like LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and email, you can use their respective APIs to implement the feature in your application. Here are some general steps you can follow:

1. Obtain the API keys for the social media platforms you want to use. For example, LinkedIn has the LinkedIn Marketing Developer Platform, WhatsApp has the WhatsApp Business API, and email services have various APIs such as the Gmail API.
2. Set up the API clients in your backend using Express.js. You can use libraries like `node-linkedin` for LinkedIn, `whatsapp-web.js` for WhatsApp, and `nodemailer` for email services.
3. Create a route in your backend to handle the file upload and sending it to the social media platforms. You can use `multer` middleware to handle file uploads.
4. In the frontend using React.js, create a form for the user to upload the file and select the social media platforms to send it to.
5. When the user submits the form, send a request to the backend route created in step 3, which will handle sending the file to the selected social media platforms using their respective APIs.
6. Handle any errors or exceptions that may occur during the file upload or sending process.

It's worth noting that each social media platform may have different requirements and limitations for sending files through their APIs, so be sure to check their documentation for specific details.

s0006u0001.assistant_reply: Marianne was a symbol of the French Republic in the 19th century because she personified the values of liberty, equality, and fraternity that were central to the ideals of the Republic. Marianne was often depicted as a beautiful, strong-willed woman who represented the revolutionary spirit of France. Her image could be seen on everything from coins and stamps to public buildings and monuments. Marianne became a symbol of national unity and an embodiment of the French people's aspirations for social justice and political reform. She represented the ideal of a democratic, progressive, and forward-thinking society that valued individual rights and collective responsibility. In short, Marianne was the face of the French Republic, and her image served as a powerful reminder of the nation's goals and aspirations.

s0006u0002.assistant_reply: It is true that the choice to represent the French Republic through a female figure may seem sexist by today's standards. However, during the 19th century, using a feminine figure as a national symbol was not unusual. The choice of a woman to represent the Republic may have had several reasons - She symbolically represented the French Republic as a nurturing mother, in addition to her beauty and strength. Additionally, the French Revolution and the subsequent establishment of the Republic were seen as a break from the monarchical tradition of male rulers, so a female figure came to symbolize this new era of equality and democracy. Overall, the choice of Marianne as a symbol for the French Republic was a reflection of the values of the time and may not necessarily be sexist in intent.

s0006u0003.assistant_reply: The use of Marianne as a symbol of the French Republic does not necessarily indicate that women were truly given equal rights during the 19th century. In 1944, after the end of World War II, women in France were granted the right to vote for the first time, and this was partly due to the efforts of feminist activists who had relied on symbols like Marianne to make their case.
